Enum Class DerivateInductance

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<DerivateInductance>
lcr.enums.DerivateInductance
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<DerivateInductance>, Constable
public enum DerivateInductance extends Enum<DerivateInductance>
Representation of secondary or derived complex electrical parameters computed alongside primary Inductance (L) measurements under AC test signals. * @author sylkat
